sterling-safety.blurb: Icomply Property Services installs, commissions and services Sterling Safety fire detection across Stockport, Manchester and the wider North West. Our engineers work to BS 5839, delivering new systems, upgrades and planned maintenance with full certification for landlords, FM teams and principal contractors. Trade detectors, call points and panel spares are available through our shop for site packs and reactive call-outs.
sterling-safety.seo_desc: Sterling Safety fire alarm install, BS 5839 service & trade spares from Icomply across Stockport, Manchester & the North West.

suprema.blurb: Icomply designs and installs Suprema biometric and card access control for commercial sites across Greater Manchester, Cheshire and Lancashire. From BioStation readers to door controllers, we handle commissioning, staff credentialing and ongoing service so estates stay secure and audit-ready. Landlords and trade partners can order Suprema readers, tokens and controller spares direct from our North West trade shop.
suprema.seo_desc: Suprema access control install, biometric readers & trade spares from Icomply in Manchester, Stockport & the North West.

system-sensor.blurb: Icomply specifies and installs System Sensor detection devices on BS 5839 fire alarm systems throughout the North West. Smoke, heat and multi-sensor heads are fitted, tested and certified with clear zone schedules for insurers and building control. Our trade shop supplies System Sensor bases, detectors and call-point packs for engineers and facilities teams in Manchester, Stockport and beyond.

systemair.blurb: Icomply installs and maintains Systemair AOV and smoke-control ventilation for residential and commercial buildings across the North West. Actuators, fans and control panels are commissioned to BS 9991 and EN 12101, with periodic testing and certification for fire strategies and landlord compliance. Trade actuator kits and panel spares keep FM teams and contractors stocked for reactive repairs.

tdsi.blurb: Icomply is a North West partner for TDSi access control — designing, installing and servicing MICROgarde and related systems for offices, education and multi-tenant sites. We programme controllers, issue credentials and provide reactive support so doors stay secure and compliant. Trade readers, fobs and controller spares are available through our Stockport-based shop for engineers and FM teams.

tektone.blurb: Icomply installs and services TekTone nurse call systems for care homes, clinics and supported living across Greater Manchester and the North West. Call points, pear leads and corridor indicators are commissioned with clear zone mapping aligned to HTM 08-03 guidance. Planned maintenance, battery changes and trade spares keep TekTone systems reliable for care providers and estates managers.

texecom.blurb: Icomply installs and maintains Texecom Premier and Elite intruder alarms for homes, offices and commercial premises across the North West. Systems are designed to PD 6662 / BS EN 50131, with graded detectors, keypads and signalling options to suit insurers and end users. Trade PIRs, contacts and expansion modules are stocked for engineers and landlords who need fast spares from our trade shop.

thorlux.blurb: Icomply supplies, installs and tests Thorlux emergency lighting for commercial and industrial sites across Stockport, Manchester and the North West. Maintained and non-maintained luminaires are designed to BS 5266 with full duration testing and certification for compliance audits. Trade LED fittings, batteries and exit legend packs support contractors and FM teams on planned and reactive works.

thorn-lighting.blurb: Icomply installs and services Thorn Lighting emergency luminaires for offices, retail and public buildings throughout the North West. From bulkheads to escape-route fittings, we design to BS 5266, complete duration tests and issue clear certification packs. tiandy.blurb: Icomply designs and installs Tiandy CCTV for retail, industrial and multi-site portfolios across Greater Manchester and the North West. IP cameras, NVRs and remote viewing are commissioned to BS EN 62676 with clear coverage plans for insurers and security managers. Trade mounts, cabling and NVR accessories are available from our shop so contractors can complete Tiandy projects without delay.
